body:

#
Friends and supporters!

Today is our indomitable campaign manager’s birthday. Marguerite is a **powerhouse** and one of the biggest reasons this campaign has been on such an incredible upward trajectory since she began leading the team. Marguerite is smart and kind and deeply committed to our success. She likes cats and cheese curds and winning Congressional elections for people who are hellbent on the kind of change we all deserve.

She turns 26 today -- [can you make a $26 donation in her honor](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=96d468f8b2&e=140a9b81e7)? (And she’s first line to replies to these emails -- tell her what a great job she’s doing!)

Many happy returns, Marguerite.

Thanks,
Dani

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Back The Blue
body:
TN FOP Endorses Hagerty
Peter,I am honored to have the endorsement of Tennessee's Fraternal Order of Police. Our police officers put their lives on the line every day to serve our communities, not knowing if they will return home at the end of the day. Across the country, violence and anarchy are prominent in several major cities, as many leaders call to defund and dismantle police departments. It is unacceptable. I am also proud to have earned the endorsement of over 100 members of our law enforcement community in Tennessee. Read more about the Law Enforcement For Hagerty coalition **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xglily-fuutjhhtj-r/)** As Tennessee's next Senator, I stand with our law enforcement officers 120 percent, and I will work to ensure they are provided with the resources necessary to carry out their duties. Best, Bill Hagerty
Republican Nominee for United States Senate | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xglily-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xglily-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xglily-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xglily-fuutjhhtj-i/)

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Countdown To Early Vote
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-jj/) October 6, 2020 **Countdown To Early Voting** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-r/) We're 8 days away from the start of early voting, and #TeamHagerty is ready to support Republicans up and down the ballot. Bill is traveling across the state, from Memphis to Mountain City, to talk with Tennesseans about what's important to us. Tennesseans want to send strong conservatives to Washington this November because conservative values are Tennessee values. **We Must Fill The Seat** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-y/) President Trump has a constitutional duty to nominate a Supreme Court justice to fill the vacancy created by the passing of Justice Ginsburg. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and their radical allies in the Democrat Party want to distract and threaten in a manner aimed at preventing the President from performing his duty. Last week, Team Hagerty released a video encouraging the President and the Republican Senate majority to fill the Supreme Court seat.Watch the full video [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-j/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country.
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-t/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-i/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-d/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Clarksville Now:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-h/) Bill Hagerty holds campaign event at Johnny's Big Burger, receives endorsement from Mayor Durrett****[Elizabethton Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-k/) Senatorial candidate says thanks, and urges GOP support in election****[Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-u/) Tennessee, Georgia Senators Weigh In On Amy Barrett High Court Nomination****[LaFollette Press:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-o/) Clays for Children fires away for a good cause**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-b/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-m/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-c/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-f/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xgdyn-fuutjhhtj-yh/)

name: Jasmine Smith
subject: The time is now, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/7vJRz7aA3XXPDsNd-uKL6fl4XyPwa9Wlc4iqJpcfsjo=?refcode=1st)
---
| Hi Peter, We're doing everything we can to turn out Virginia voters, and it all comes down to what we can accomplish by Election Day - [**less than 4 weeks from today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/SelCrKWfypqfgmSkQmz8pMGc2bnkRks8GpwnVe8zzgg=?refcode=1st) This fall, Team Spanberger:
* Kicked off early voting with events in Henrico, Orange, Chesterfield, Powhatan, Louisa and Goochland and attended a voter registration event in Nottoway
* Released new television ads to spread Abigail's issue-focused message
* Held twice daily phone banking shifts and made thousands of calls to voters
* Delivered thousands of yard signs across VA-07

All of these critical outreach activities are made possible [**thanks to the generous support of our grassroots donors.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/SelCrKWfypqfgmSkQmz8pMGc2bnkRks8GpwnVe8zzgg=?refcode=1st) Reaching every voter takes significant resources, and we can only do it if our fundraising stays strong. According to our records, you have **not yet made an online donation** to support our campaign. If you were waiting for the right time to donate - **the time is now!** [_**Can we count on you to make your first donation right now? $5, or whatever you can contribute, will make a big difference.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/SelCrKWfypqfgmSkQmz8pMGc2bnkRks8GpwnVe8zzgg=?refcode=1st) We are running in one of the most competitive races in the country and the stakes are so high. **We do not want to look back at this period of the campaign with regret, wishing that we could have afforded more ads, bought more signs, or called more voters.** [_**Please contribute today so we can run our programs at full capacity.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/7vJRz7aA3XXPDsNd-uKL6fl4XyPwa9Wlc4iqJpcfsjo=?refcode=1st) In 2018, we built one of the biggest people-powered campaigns the Commonwealth had ever seen, and we won! With help from grassroots donors like you, we can do it again this year.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/7vJRz7aA3XXPDsNd-uKL6fl4XyPwa9Wlc4iqJpcfsjo=?refcode=1st)
---
Thank you,
_Jasmine Smith
Finance Associate _

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXKQjOA9UuFmeo3bUg6IU28FcecaZe3OiAnMNm7PdnE=/7vJRz7aA3XXPDsNd-uKL6fl4XyPwa9Wlc4iqJpcfsjo=?refcode=1st)

We know we have all the momentum on our side, but our ability to stay in the lead will come down to how many voters we reach in this final stretch.

Our campaign team has been working to connect with voters safely through phone banking and texting. Now, we’re asking you to join us in these last few weeks to ensure we reach as many people as possible and flip this seat blue on Election Day.

[**Because we have so many remote opportunities to get involved, you can help elect Eugene from anywhere. Will you sign up to volunteer with Team Eugene?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20024922/255375196/-1807322443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTVmOTBlNy1iNzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EoIjiRf4D435a6OmkGJUBknuxXq747Rw_6LfxeyY584=&emci=71cd72d7-4908-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=1e5f90e7-b708-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10203249) | [Volunteer »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20024923/255375197/-1807322443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTVmOTBlNy1iNzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EoIjiRf4D435a6OmkGJUBknuxXq747Rw_6LfxeyY584=&emci=71cd72d7-4908-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=1e5f90e7-b708-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10203249)

Look, we’re in for a fight over these last four weeks. But no matter what Scott Perry’s special interest backers throw our way, we know we can count on this grassroots team to help us cross the finish line.

[**If you can’t make one of our virtual volunteer events, we hope you consider making a contribution of $5 or more to help us continue reaching voters through Election Day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20024924/255375198/-613620204?refcode=em_eng_2020.10.07_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=1e5f90e7-b708-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTVmOTBlNy1iNzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EoIjiRf4D435a6OmkGJUBknuxXq747Rw_6LfxeyY584=) [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20024925/255375199/-613620204?refcode=em_eng_2020.10.07_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=1e5f90e7-b708-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTVmOTBlNy1iNzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EoIjiRf4D435a6OmkGJUBknuxXq747Rw_6LfxeyY584=)

Thank you,

Team Eugene
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Voters need to know what's at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Texas has registered over 1.5 million new voters since Election Day in 2016. Now, it’s the job of every campaign to identify these folks and make sure they know what’s at stake up and down the ballot.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20025872/255378671/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201007GOTVrs_TK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmE0NTQ5NS1iYTA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id8OGtzSKEafyLUDRuRrbQt8nHxprP92dr-y6uMc1hE=)
---

Texas has registered _over 1.5 million new voters_ since Election Day in 2016. Now, it’s the job of every campaign to identify these folks and make sure they know what’s at stake up and down the ballot. We’ve already seen that Texans run as far as they can from disgraced former congressman Pete Sessions once they find out about his disastrous record in Washington. **And now, with so many new voters, we have to make sure Sessions can’t trick them into thinking he’s in their court.[_Can you chip in to help us elect Rick Kennedy and defend Texas from Sessions' dangerous agenda?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20025873/255378672/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201007GOTVrs_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmE0NTQ5NS1iYTA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id8OGtzSKEafyLUDRuRrbQt8nHxprP92dr-y6uMc1hE=)** Voters need to know he was implicated in a scheme to funnel Russian money into GOP campaigns. They need to know he works every day to end the Affordable Care Act and take away coverage from people with pre-existing conditions. And they need to know that he willingly traded his vote in Congress for campaign cash from corporate PACs. His only goal is to gain power, keep it, and use it for his own benefit. **Rick has a chance to stop him from returning to Washington.** **We’re neck and neck in a recent poll, and the massive influx of new voters could turn the tide in our favor. But that means we have to run the most robust voter turnout effort this district has ever seen.[_Can you chip in just $15 to help us today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20025874/255378673/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201007GOTVrs_TK_all_xx_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmE0NTQ5NS1iYTA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id8OGtzSKEafyLUDRuRrbQt8nHxprP92dr-y6uMc1hE=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | **[Donate $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20025875/255378674/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201007GOTVrs_TK_all_xx_abx15&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmE0NTQ5NS1iYTA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id8OGtzSKEafyLUDRuRrbQt8nHxprP92dr-y6uMc1hE=)**

#
Did you see our new digital ad?

It’s a must-watch. If you haven’t already seen it, [click here to view it.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=31f9cdd047&e=140a9b81e7)

The ad is about my opponent’s terrible record on women and LGBTQ rights. He has supported restricting abortion for survivors of rape, voted against the Equality Act, and voted against transgender healthcare protections. He is anti-woman and anti-LGBTQ.******And I am the queer woman running against him. **

It’s a powerful ad, if I do say so myself. So it’s important that we put it everywhere we can. [Can I count on you to chip in and help us run it?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a227a4b799&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

subject: tough spot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20027306/255384962/-940294256?refcode=100720-es-keep-ads-on-tv-2-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yjk3Njk5ZC1iZTA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kf723HV_XtJ8wEA5kvnTJGaKLk8o0lOPd-Fl5hHZo0=&emci=69357060-be08-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=8b97699d-be08-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

We’re in a tough spot, friend.

These last few weeks of the campaign are the most critical time to spread our message to voters but we’re in one of the most expensive media markets in the country. We know Vern will continue to bail out his campaign by loaning it money and Corporate PACs will bankroll the rest.

We’re running low on resources and are in danger of being drowned out by negative ads. We knew that it would be an uphill battle in this election, but we also know that we have a real chance to win this election because we can count on our grassroots supporters like you to step up when we need you most.

**Now is that time.**

We need to raise $25,000 by Friday to keep our television ads on the air in the upcoming week. Since yesterday, we have received an outpouring of support, but we still have a long way to go.

**[Friend, can we count on you to rush an urgent contribution right now to help Margaret flip this seat from red to blue? The stakes couldn’t be higher.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20027309/255385010/1073285021?refcode2=8b97699d-be08-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=69357060-be08-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=8b97699d-be08-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=100720-es-keep-ads-on-tv-2-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yjk3Njk5ZC1iZTA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kf723HV_XtJ8wEA5kvnTJGaKLk8o0lOPd-Fl5hHZo0=)**

clean_body: We’re in a tough spot, friend. These last few weeks of the campaign are the most critical time to spread our message to voters but we’re in one of the most expensive media markets in the country. We know Vern will continue to bail out his campaign by loaning it money and Corporate PACs will bankroll the rest. We’re running low on resources and are in danger of being drowned out by negative ads. We knew that it would be an uphill battle in this election, but we also know that we have a real chance to win this election because we can count on our grassroots supporters like you to step up when we need you most. Now is that time. We need to raise $25,000 by Friday to keep our television ads on the air in the upcoming week. Since yesterday, we have received an outpouring of support, but we still have a long way to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Good for Congress HQ PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Good Luck Senator Kamala Harris-we have your back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Dear , Together We Can Win! Tonight is the first Nationally Televised Debate featuring the Candidates for Vice President. Team Nina for PA has been doing all we can to support the Biden/ Harris ticket in this crucial election. From being a 2020 Biden Delegate at the DNC to stumping for the team in Philadelphia to Erie to Scranton and everywhere in between. Leave No One Behind has been our mantra! I want to take this opportunity to wish Senator Kamala Harris GOOD LUCK at tonight's debate. We know what is at stake in November and a unified front is paramount to our victory! Like her historic candidacy, my own race is breaking barriers in PA. Help us make history! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/3i0RxKSSn9ohY4OTB2A3Gxnbb6I8xp2JOjrVLmjPKZw=) This election has started - Please help me inform more PA Residents that they can VOTE right NOW for the Biden/Harris Team and Nina Ahmad for Auditor General. **[$5, $10 or $ 20.20, $100 will help us? Can I count on you to Keep us on the road until Election Day ?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/3i0RxKSSn9ohY4OTB2A3Gxnbb6I8xp2JOjrVLmjPKZw=)** Thank you in advance and let us together move PA forward, Dr. Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/c3jNDEIml6mpLheU_QZXCecrwtF7HHI2pPtOPXTHYaU=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/3i0RxKSSn9ohY4OTB2A3Gxnbb6I8xp2JOjrVLmjPKZw=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/E7XNZu_FgqNI6zNPcnMAbQcYKP9IpblkxG--07HdFUY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/cEy0mR20gXI9XNzfrh8YYMsq7Qt5Qe9e9DG4jnU1HIs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3dZAkjqu7QjzTJyf5kKFefyvDA-SgA9_mWhiCP11Eys=/buYyiodZXuM_15DNW-RvSFgpDa3IGB9MkqcEkXg4l9w=?hl=en)

subject: New TV Ad!
body:
Upcoming Virtual Events

| New TV Ad! Sometimes, you just have to set the record straight.
---
| Keep an eye out for our new ad on TV! Airing now.
Elaine Luria [admitted on WAVY 10](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dVquLNm7wfzEmq5oLlejvkU3tNBIWS6jlRIZZmILtQRqPoFCGvDgp8GtuoZAxI7PM-2xaUxHJ3-KYl7Et6vdxrpvRpQNANSB0hF8OcXQNR4hpKweBUcmuhFdeP_qTKWvZkFb5GjEm_4ZNjLGSho0K7Etl4W-wn7D7GcomeF4rzULfFKD2-fzuAfBn2BrAM45AMrgcTLjg0BtatXJGu3XM0iOAc5Sjounntnx4cQI14E41g2YFGav1eVJJXA9N5kSGTFkRuBzZQTqogH28NkxWg==&c=mjmz9g9x3P23a8lIfPmgxs7yQTg6lP7ZClOU-mD8fQwKQFdNXRJTEA==&ch=fxxBPIQkgZ0Xp3qTwjVBtiBLK7A1dN09cJUh2gAYZmz-Mi-UiZqEiw==) that Scott Taylor has not been accused of any wrongdoing. However, Luria and Nancy Pelosi's liberal allies have spent over $3M on a baseless political smear campaign against Scott Taylor.
Luria has repeatedly lied to voters, and her actions in the [WAVY 10 video interview](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dVquLNm7wfzEmq5oLlejvkU3tNBIWS6jlRIZZmILtQRqPoFCGvDgp8GtuoZAxI7PM-2xaUxHJ3-KYl7Et6vdxrpvRpQNANSB0hF8OcXQNR4hpKweBUcmuhFdeP_qTKWvZkFb5GjEm_4ZNjLGSho0K7Etl4W-wn7D7GcomeF4rzULfFKD2-fzuAfBn2BrAM45AMrgcTLjg0BtatXJGu3XM0iOAc5Sjounntnx4cQI14E41g2YFGav1eVJJXA9N5kSGTFkRuBzZQTqogH28NkxWg==&c=mjmz9g9x3P23a8lIfPmgxs7yQTg6lP7ZClOU-mD8fQwKQFdNXRJTEA==&ch=fxxBPIQkgZ0Xp3qTwjVBtiBLK7A1dN09cJUh2gAYZmz-Mi-UiZqEiw==) speak louder than words: it is clear that Elaine knows the truth.
Our new advertisement can be viewed below & on our campaign YouTube Channel [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dVquLNm7wfzEmq5oLlejvkU3tNBIWS6jlRIZZmILtQRqPoFCGvDgp8GtuoZAxI7PSNjZVgf7MpCZ9Tof7hAt8lgb6Dl1BZUIdVOTgf1IM5Ma11dvvCtZwHmujheK5vP8LhtrdyMoTqWL_cbRZxI8rlb-zh2jB7EZBC9m3zSNcweebtojXJ7PpA==&c=mjmz9g9x3P23a8lIfPmgxs7yQTg6lP7ZClOU-mD8fQwKQFdNXRJTEA==&ch=fxxBPIQkgZ0Xp3qTwjVBtiBLK7A1dN09cJUh2gAYZmz-Mi-UiZqEiw==).
We need your support now. We are being dramatically outspent, and with only 27 days remaining in this cycle, we urgently need support from people like you to amplify our important message.
What can you do today to help? We ask that you please donate $20 now for this critical 2020 race!

body:
The Vice Presidential debate is TONIGHT and a fellow Hoosier needs your help! >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469802?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-vp-debate-100720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_vp_debate_100720&mc_cid=9fcee441da&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Hoosier Republican,

Fellow Hoosier Vice President Mike Pence will take the stage tonight against Kamala Harris in the first and only vice presidential debate of this election.

We’re wishing him luck tonight as he defends the Trump-Pence record against the far-left socialist attacks of the Biden-Harris ticket.

We know the Vice President will do us proud tonight! Will you help us share the news of his debate performance after he’s done? All it takes is a quick $5 contribution to help us share the Trump-Pence record. Will you stand with us to make sure he knows that his home state has his back? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-vp-debate-100720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_vp_debate_100720&amount=5&mc_cid=9fcee441da&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

VICE PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE CONTRIBUTION
STATUS: MISSING
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
CONTRIBUTE NOW (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-vp-debate-100720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_vp_debate_100720&amount=5&mc_cid=9fcee441da&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-vp-debate-100720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_vp_debate_100720&amount=5&mc_cid=9fcee441da&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

It is up to grassroots supporters like you to fuel this campaign, and I hope the Vice President can count on your support tonight.

Thanks for your support,
Kyle Hupfer

name: Bill Olson
subject: God bless President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

Hi Peter,

I pray for the President and First Lady to make a full recovery- and for the extreme Left to be defeated this year!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I won because I support the President, and I will bring his fight to the liberals in my crucial Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ
!

The Left wishing people dead isn't new. They have been doing this for years now- and ESPECIALLY to President Trump!

For years, Trump Derangement Syndrome has been real- and widespread among the extreme Left.

I would have thought Nancy Pelosi and the far Left would have acted like real human beings for a change.... I guess not.

The Democrats quickly went from bemoaning President Trump’s disregard for Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s dying wish to wishing death on the president.

And if you think the venomous hatred was only spewed by basement-dwelling Twitter trolls, you’re mistaken. All across the country, wealthy celebrities and woke blue checkmarks could not hide their ghoulish glee at the president’s recent coronavirus diagnosis.

Hillary Clinton’s former spokeswoman, Zara Rahim, tweeted, “It’s been against my moral identity to tweet this for the past four years, but, I hope he dies.”

I wonder if Zara has a Love Trumps Hate bumper sticker on her car.

The Los Angeles Times published a piece titled, “When Reagan was shot, the country rallied around, but he hadn’t spent months downplaying assassins.”

How many of their readers have “Hate has no home here” signs on their lawn?

Actor Tom Arnold shared Trump aide Hope Hicks’ personal cell phone number in a since-deleted tweet. “Silent thoughts & prayers aren’t enough for national treasure Hope Hicks. She needs to hear them.”

Tom must have momentarily forgotten the sacred liberal mantra, “when they go low, we go high”.

Due to this glaring hypocrisy, I have a modest request for the tolerant left. No, I don’t expect liberals to condemn Zara’s repugnant words — after all, Republicans are the only group expected to disavow miscreants. Nor do I expect the gatekeepers at Twitter to suspend Tom Arnold’s account.

My plea to liberals is much simpler: Stop lecturing us on how Biden will restore moral leadership to America. Joe Biden’s moral compass is about as reliable as the numerical figures he rattles off at his campaign stops.

These hard Leftists are made from the same stuff as Kathy Griffin, who "joked" about beheading the President!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

I will say this for 2020, it has exposed how deranged the Left is. These people really want Trump dead- and maybe the rest of us Trump supporters too.

Joe Biden has the nerve to moralize to us, but his supporters have been burning cities and killing people, and hoping the President dead, all year!

We have no choice. We MUST win this year, or people who wish us harm will literally be holding the reins of power.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

The President is down for a couple weeks- but we are not! It's time for us to step up and win this race for him.

Think how much he's done for us. He brought our country back! Tens of millions of jobs created. The Supreme Court justices. Tax cuts. Justice reform.

Now let's step up and win it for him!

I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

Trump needs Florida. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade. If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. That's why we must win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ
today? We need to stay up on TV- and we need your help this week to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFyB7wds.F6OuRU&b=7wU96XB.YON6xV8Ejkf9RQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, I pray for the President and First Lady to make a full recovery- and for the extreme Left to be defeated this year! My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I won because I support the President, and I will bring his fight to the liberals in my crucial Florida swing district ! The Left wishing people dead isn't new. They have been doing this for years now- and ESPECIALLY to President Trump! For years, Trump Derangement Syndrome has been real- and widespread among the extreme Left. I would have thought Nancy Pelosi and the far Left would have acted like real human beings for a change.... I guess not. The Democrats quickly went from bemoaning President Trump’s disregard for Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s dying wish to wishing death on the president. And if you think the venomous hatred was only spewed by basement-dwelling Twitter trolls, you’re mistaken. All across the country, wealthy celebrities and woke blue checkmarks could not hide their ghoulish glee at the president’s recent coronavirus diagnosis. Hillary Clinton’s former spokeswoman, Zara Rahim, tweeted, “It’s been against my moral identity to tweet this for the past four years, but, I hope he dies.” I wonder if Zara has a Love Trumps Hate bumper sticker on her car. The Los Angeles Times published a piece titled, “When Reagan was shot, the country rallied around, but he hadn’t spent months downplaying assassins.” How many of their readers have “Hate has no home here” signs on their lawn? Actor Tom Arnold shared Trump aide Hope Hicks’ personal cell phone number in a since-deleted tweet. “Silent thoughts & prayers aren’t enough for national treasure Hope Hicks. She needs to hear them.” Tom must have momentarily forgotten the sacred liberal mantra, “when they go low, we go high”. Due to this glaring hypocrisy, I have a modest request for the tolerant left. No, I don’t expect liberals to condemn Zara’s repugnant words — after all, Republicans are the only group expected to disavow miscreants. Nor do I expect the gatekeepers at Twitter to suspend Tom Arnold’s account. My plea to liberals is much simpler: Stop lecturing us on how Biden will restore moral leadership to America. Joe Biden’s moral compass is about as reliable as the numerical figures he rattles off at his campaign stops. These hard Leftists are made from the same stuff as Kathy Griffin, who "joked" about beheading the President! Image I will say this for 2020, it has exposed how deranged the Left is. These people really want Trump dead- and maybe the rest of us Trump supporters too. Joe Biden has the nerve to moralize to us, but his supporters have been burning cities and killing people, and hoping the President dead, all year! We have no choice. We MUST win this year, or people who wish us harm will literally be holding the reins of power. Image The President is down for a couple weeks- but we are not! It's time for us to step up and win this race for him. Think how much he's done for us. He brought our country back! Tens of millions of jobs created. The Supreme Court justices. Tax cuts. Justice reform. Now let's step up and win it for him! I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left! Trump needs Florida. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade. If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. That's why we must win! I need your help to stand up AGAINST the far Left! Can you help me? This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? We need to stay up on TV- and we need your help this week to do that! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! name: My Faith Votes
subject: A Conversation with Pastor David Platt, Before You Vote
body:
| | Peter, Pastor David Platt, Lead Pastor of McLean Bible Church in Washington, D.C., and author of the best-selling book _Radical_ has been a great friend to My Faith Votes since our inception. I recently had the privilege of talking with him about an important new resource he created called, “ _Before You Vote: Seven Questions Every Christian Should Ask_.” For me, this booklet is a game-changer when it comes to voting as a Christian! Pastor Platt gives valuable biblical insight into how we approach the voting booth. He also reminds us that as “governing” citizens of the United States, we are accountable before God for the good of the people affected by our government in who we choose on our ballots. You may recall that Pastor Platt was caught in a social media firestorm last year when the President unexpectedly arrived at his church on a Sunday morning, asking for prayer. In our conversation, you will hear more of his insights into that event and how it led to the writing of this booklet. [Watch our conversation](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHLBFFOfhbeBmkpWhJc2HdPJTDmijG-0lCm5sgKQ3vumwpwZzXOCnwuxeOkuPTqbZ8kicfHZr527dNF7hYc7cj&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201007com01&n=1), “ _Before You Vote_ ,” then make your plan to vote on November 3. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHLBFFOfhbeBmkpWhJc2HdPJTDmijG-0lCm5sgKQ3vumwpwZzXOCnwuxeOkuPTqbZ8kicfHZr527dNF7hYc7cj&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201007com01&n=2) **Pray. Think. Vote,** Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201007com01&n=3) P.S. We’ve got voter guides and ballot guides covering elections in every state! Find your guides in our [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201007com01&n=4) today.
---
* * *

Republicans have made it clear they have no interest in conducting meaningful oversight of ICE. That is why we need to galvanize voters of all ages and backgrounds to turn out in down ballot races and tilt the scale of the U.S. Senate with our two Toss Up Senate races. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = We cannot fully heal the scars of what has been done in our name, but if we are to reverse course before any more harm can be done, we must vote like each other’s lives depend on it — because they do. —Teresa Tomlinson = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Cory Booker
subject: Need a minute to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
President Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, poses a grave risk to the Affordable Care Act, Roe v. Wade, and more. The American people deserve better than to have a justice rushed
Hi there --
**People are _already voting_ in this year's election, but President Trump and Mitch McConnell are ramming through their nominee to replace the late great Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg on the Supreme Court.**
While Justice Ginsburg championed gender equality, reproductive choice, LGBTQ rights, affordable health care, and so much more, her potential replacement stands staunchly against those same values and protections for Americans.
Only hours after Justice Ginsburg's passing, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell made the disgraceful decision to announce his intention to rush Trump's far-right nominee through the confirmation process -- before voters can make their choice on Election Day.
If McConnell and Trump succeed, everything from the Affordable Care Act -- which the Supreme Court will begin hearing arguments on just one week after the election -- to _Roe v. Wade_ , to marriage equality, to DACA, to gun violence reforms, and so much more are on the line.
And with Trump refusing to commit to a peaceful transfer of power if he loses the election, in addition to admitting that he is counting on this nominee to rule in his favor in cases related to the election that might come before the Supreme Court, our democracy _in and of itself_ is at risk.
Look everyone, in 2016 when Justice Antonin Scalia passed away and President Obama nominated the respected and highly qualified Judge Merrick Garland to fill his vacancy, Republicans refused to even hold a single hearing to consider Garland's nomination, claiming that it was wrong to appoint a Supreme Court justice during an election year before the American people could make their voices heard.
That principle is long gone for McConnell and other members of the Senate who have made it clear they're more devoted to Trump and party interests than the best interests of the people they were elected to serve.
Protecting vulnerable Democrats is the best way to preserve the integrity of our courts.
That's why I'm asking: [**Will you please split a $3 donation between my campaign and Senator Hassan 's to send a message to Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell and protect the future of the Supreme Court? Anything you can give makes a difference.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc550/2a380d31/20b01772/f0b25f/2287069456/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9va2VyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDEwMDdfTVdINENCX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4booker?refcode=e20201007_MWH4CB_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for fighting by my side,
Cory
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc550/2a380d31/20b01772/f0b25f/2287069456/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9va2VyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDEwMDdfTVdINENCX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4booker?refcode=e20201007_MWH4CB_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

Friend,

Four weeks is not a lot of time, but that’s all we have until Election Day. As promising as it looks for many of our West Virginia Democrats, it’s still 2020 and Trump is still the President so anything could happen. Republicans are throwing huge money towards ad spends and media buys, hoping to take down and discredit as many Democratic candidates as possible.
We’re in the home stretch, but we can’t let our guard down. The WVDP is pushing our GOTV efforts and trying harder than ever to mobilize Democrats. We need to be fired up and ready to go! That’s why I’d love it if you could make a donation right now, and help support the WVDP. This is when it matters most. I know we can count on you. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP

Friend, We're releasing our new ad soon and I'm giving my most dedicated supporters a sneak preview before everyone else. Right now, Western New York needs a JOB CREATOR in office, someone who's created jobs before, has run a successful small business, and knows how to get our economy going again. I've been a successful small businessman for over 20 years, and I have hit the ground running in Congress to cut red tape, get critical resources to small businesses, and advance policies that will unleash the American private sector. Watch my new ad here: [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8TfBr0A8ak041f1E01BBlw/E9KB5AA2cSIllLvUILwO763A) We're taking this message of strong results for Western New York to the airwaves, and I need your help to make sure we can stay strong - we have less than a month until the critical election on November 3rd, and we need all hands on deck to make sure we can keep this message on air. There is a clear choice in this election, and we're sending a loud message that I am working to create good-paying American jobs, cut red-tape, and rebuild our Western New York economy - can I count on you? [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8TfBr0A8ak041f1E01BBlw/E9KB5AA2cSIllLvUILwO763A) Together, we will make sure we restore our historic American economy and unleash a new era of prosperity for our region and our nation. Sincerely,

Chris Jacobs

clean_body: | Friend, We're releasing our new ad soon and I'm giving my most dedicated supporters a sneak preview before everyone else. Right now, Western New York needs a JOB CREATOR in office, someone who's created jobs before, has run a successful small business, and knows how to get our economy going again. I've been a successful small businessman for over 20 years, and I have hit the ground running in Congress to cut red tape, get critical resources to small businesses, and advance policies that will unleash the American private sector. Watch my new ad here: We're taking this message of strong results for Western New York to the airwaves, and I need your help to make sure we can stay strong - we have less than a month until the critical election on November 3rd, and we need all hands on deck to make sure we can keep this message on air. There is a clear choice in this election, and we're sending a loud message that I am working to create good-paying American jobs, cut red-tape, and rebuild our Western New York economy - can I count on you? Together, we will make sure we restore our historic American economy and unleash a new era of prosperity for our region and our nation. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs * 5501 Camp Road P.O. Box 893 Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: FWD: I have some very exciting news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Hey,

Did you see Beto’s email from yesterday? Next Monday, we’re spending the
holiday calling over one million Texas voters to turn them out for early
voting!

But we’re only going to hit that goal if we have enough help. Which is why
superstars like Willie Nelson, Bernie Sanders, Julián Castro, Stacey
Abrams, and Andrew Yang will be joining us as we try to meet this massive
goal! Plus, we’ll be kicking off our 4:30PM CT phone bank with Oprah and
Beto! Join them as they talk about the importance of voting and the role
Texas can play in this election. After we say goodbye to Oprah, we’ll hop
on the Dialer with Beto and call Texas voters. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201007-108008&t=1001&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL ]Can you join them?

These amazing activists, public servants, and political leaders know that
if volunteers like YOU step up and turn out one million (or more!) Texan
voters for early voting, we can totally flip the Texas legislature, win
back a U.S. Senate seat, and help elect Joe Biden. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201007-108008&t=1002&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL ]Don’t miss out on
this awesome opportunity – sign up for a phone bank shift with one of our
special guests today!

See you there,

Kate Roberts

Powered by People

---------FWD---------

FROM: Beto O'Rourke
DATE: Oct. 5, 2020
SUBJECT: I have some very
exciting newsI
TO: Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com

I’ve got some exciting news for you. In fact, this is the most exciting
thing that’s happened since we started Powered by People.

But first, let me give you an idea of how far we’ve come and what we have
left to do.

Over the last 7 months, Powered by People volunteers have registered over
100,000 voters and made over 40 million voter contact attempts. These new
voters and these newly engaged voters could make the difference in
critical elections up and down the ballot.

Now, with early voting about to start, and Election Day so close we can
see it, we have to bring it home and turn them out.

That means calling every potential Democratic voter in the state and
helping them make a commitment to vote on the first day of Early Voting.

So, on Monday October 12th, we will host the [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?t=1003&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL ]Calling Texas: The Million
Voter Phone Bank, and we won’t be doing it alone. Here’s where the big
news that I was telling you about comes in.

We’ll be joined on the phone bank by (get this!!): Oprah Winfrey, Willie
Nelson, Bernie Sanders, Julián Castro, Stacey Abrams and Andrew Yang,
among others.

That’s right: these amazing artists, public servants, and political
leaders are committed to doing their part to make sure we reach every
Texas voter who has the power to decide the outcome of the most important
election in our history.

The question is, will you do yours?

This could be the largest single day voter contact effort in Texas
history, and I want you to be part of it. Plus, Oprah Winfrey, Willie
Nelson, Bernie Sanders, Julián Castro, Stacey Abrams, and Andrew Yang!!!

RSVP here:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201007-108008&t=1004&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL ]Calling Texas: The Million Voter Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201007-108008&t=1005&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL ]Monday, October 12

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201007-108008&t=1006&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL ]Get more info or RSVP »

Let's do this!

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=108008%2E444211%2Ejj1clL

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

subject: More than 750,000 Virginians have already cast their ballots in this election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Help us keep up the momentum ahead of Election Day!
|
---

| | Derek --

More than 750,000 Virginians have already cast their ballots in this election!

This is an amazing start -- but we can't afford to lose steam now. We've got to keep up this pace with early voting so we can achieve the kind of huge turnout that we need to re-elect Mark Warner and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

**[Can you make a contribution now to help us keep the momentum up as early voting continues?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da7c/53d9897e/55ad0b91/1c88ed77/2294283844/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-records?refcode=20201007_f_1_nd__855__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Our campaign staff and amazing volunteers are working hard to get the word out that all Virginia voters can cast their ballots early through October 31st at their local registrar's office. Now, we need your help to keep getting the word out about how and where to vote this year.

We're aiming to reach as many voters as we can across the Commonwealth so we can re-elect Mark and keep Virginia blue. **Can you help us reach that goal?** _If you've saved your payment information Friend,

Did you tune in to the debate today?

Predictable Pappas used every play in the DC playbook. Misleading voters, distorting the facts about his voting record, lying about where Matt stands on the issues...It was so typical of a Swamp Democrat.

**But Matt didn’t miss a step.**

He drilled Pappas on his radical far-left policies:
* _Working to pass the single largest tax hike in history_
* _Giving China a free pass for covering up COVID-19 and polluting our planet_
* _Siding with violent mobs instead of cops_
* _Taking away our 2nd Amendment rights_
* _Silencing New Hampshire’s voice in national elections_
* _Voting with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time_

**This debate was proof - Matt is the man we need in Washington, NOT Chris Pappas.**

name: Barack Obama
subject: What Jay and I both believe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to believe.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8182%2E868730%2EV4j9pE) Friend, Jay knows -- like I do -- that our country is better than this. We both believe that we've got to reject the politics that pits working Americans against one another. We are stronger together, and we've got to fight together to give everybody a fair shot. We don't have time for charlatans, and we don't have time for hatred, and we don't have time for bigotry. That was true in 2016, and it's true again now. Together, we have to fix what's broken, and together, we have to build something better. And that is exactly why we need leaders like Jay Inslee. Jay believes in building something better -- in making progress for all Washingtonians on everything from health care, gun violence prevention, clean energy, paid family leave, and reproductive choice. Keeping leaders like Jay Inslee in office now is more important than ever. **[I hope you'll join me in supporting Jay Inslee's reelection campaign and show that we're stronger together by donating $5 or more right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12513?t=4&akid=8182%2E868730%2EV4j9pE)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12514?t=5&akid=8182%2E868730%2EV4j9pE)

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New Article: "Kamala Harris's American Example"
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1984ef87da3c4c2c95997bdcc84f9c70&_e=Kih2x9jFcfkEbanVFWMaI7L_9RDUOPFqAg2j_mdeKZ_GaAoED4QcLHPS962IveY3qlor9CzZqDyEJqC7wtBq6ljT7Z5XMO5pMYWbSwmP1SoUIg54NBxBev_KqMNcAt3XtzD5FUeUly5mwmC3pUhLu6tE7OuJIZzhcdNJ-EghlbFZC6QxRM9q5KJXYtO-CEdly7HfM4HYzsuH8mp4OlLfdrvnFLNDOHqLrj8_N9NrgNaERVhhnsVtx8OAUKWxQ6xo) I hope you had a chance to read my latest article, _Kamala Harris’s American Example._ A biracial woman who has been elected to statewide office multiple times, and whose immigrant parents worked in some of the nation’s most prestigious schools and labs, might proudly proclaim America’s “melting pot” a success. Her family is an immigrant success story. So why does she prefer to play victim? [Click here to read the full article.](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1984ef87da3c4c2c95997bdcc84f9c70&_e=GAxCkPpblA8sGH2IKZxPUt3N__FKtDudWIhYgRfp4l0Fdg-y1AW6AjpKbY65H8aFqAIy_VKgWIOgcGY5d2gOkE4-STK-Kim3Du68Q897zHJZWh9FyPhnGIQlsYQ5Uz5KC1ZMhBeq6_8hY2n8RRtP7hezPqht4Y2UMLdL73r3UNBUO8uf7eCzl7Kxp1O13MpaN-6fgs2JWfE7EShj54g3usL8GopbiIlNhN79QCX_HBeyLKN-8Sh1vE7Bn0Ea6Jl5_4NsZsObovF7CJWwgr5AIL_iwsWG6g4lNArzy8sfrC9AGmnJIUrqjzUsSZ7avY9ReIhmH6vQBhCSReEEpO_Q3A%3D%3D) Sincerely, Bobby Jindal Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=1984ef87da3c4c2c95997bdcc84f9c70&_t=qVG7lWY-UX71BZN9xbzTB3CUsZI4LCdL6LQMVDkCzUYItcaqy1S9eHRRi3Re20nXJMwRHxsyA7aCB0LYHTpvSmkHfGuwDx9fqTciqTw3UM2N10RXpgTvsithZYV_7GHDYl8UfNSW84tiPWjIfXNxUK7ZiMOW5FsWWX8OeIpzZvQ%3D)

clean_body: I have some big news to share... | = | | Friends, I have a major announcement to make, and I wanted you to be among the first to know: We just added Mike Siegel to our Red to Blue program ― our highly competitive list of challenger campaigns that will flip seats from red to blue in November. I’ve been keeping close tabs on Mike’s campaign, and I’ve been incredibly impressed with what I’ve seen. As a civil rights lawyer and former public school teacher, Mike Siegel is a champion for everyday people. The inspiring energy behind Mike and his grassroots campaign put this district on the map in 2018, and he will finish the job in 2020. This is a big moment, friends. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Now that Mike Siegel is running a Red to Blue race, he is at the center of our efforts to protect and expand our House Majority. This means that the Republican establishment is sure to do (and spend!) whatever it takes to defeat Mike and protect their dangerous status quo and their special interest buddies. The path to victory in TX-10 runs through grassroots supporters like you, and Mike needs your support in order to win big on Election Day. I’m asking again: = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = As I’ve been known to say ― the best defense is a good offense. Mike is an integral part of our offensive strategy, and I’m grateful for all you do to support him. Thank you for everything you do, Cheri Bustos Chairwoman, DCCC | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Nancy Pelosi’s ‘Covid-Relief’ Bill Is Mainly Just a Left-Wing Wish List
body:
Pelosi’s version would fritter away hundreds of billions of dollars closing state and city budget gaps, with nothing long term to show for it. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6fbc1c9840&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Nancy Pelosi’s ‘Covid-Relief’ Bill Is Mainly Just a Left-Wing Wish List**

“The House speaker has been badgering the GOP to pass her $2.2 trillion coronavirus relief bill to ‘crush the virus, so that we can reopen the economy and our schools safely.’ Yet her bill would do almost nothing to achieve those goals,” Betsy McCaughey writes in the _New York Post_.

“Her bill would rewrite election law for 2020, barring voter-ID requirements” and making other changes that have nothing to do with relief for workers. “Pelosi’s version would fritter away hundreds of billions of dollars closing state and city budget gaps, with nothing long term to show for it. We won’t be any more prepared for the next pandemic.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39082e6661&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Support for Judge Amy Coney Barrett spiked over the last two weeks . . . The number of voters who say the Senate should reject Barrett’s nomination dropped three points to 31 percent,” Mairead McArdle reports. “Some Democrats [in Congress] have suggested or said directly that they are open to adding justices to the Court should Barrett be confirmed.” Read more in the [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=55ff2db0a5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Eli Lilly & Co. said it has requested U.S. authorization of the emergency use of an experimental antibody-based treatment for people with recently diagnosed, mild-to-moderate Covid-19, following positive results from clinical testing.” This antibody drug “could not only provide treatment but also potentially give temporary protection against the virus to people at risk of infection,” Peter Loftus reports in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b82bbb62f0&e=3ee4985eea)._
---
|
---
| When it comes to clean air, clean water, and conservation, “for far too long, the Left has pursued ineffective and unworkable policies that unnecessarily put jobs and economic growth at risk, rather than achieving practical results. This all changed with the Trump Administration, where actions speak louder than words,” writes Mary Neumayr, chair of the White House Council on Environmental Quality, for [_RealClearEnergy_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=256d4d0929&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bd9b9173f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=94da066ee2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6c0575bde2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: We’re missing your response, Derek? -- and this is your last opportunity to let us know where you stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Asking one last time: Can we count on you to help Democrats win this year? | |
---
Derek -- are you with us? No less than the future of our democracy is at stake in this election, and no one candidate can do it alone. **Reversing the damage of the last four years and building a future with our Democratic values will take _all of us_ doing what we can, when we can, little by little through November 3. ** I remember waking up after Election Day in 2016 like it was yesterday, and I know none of us want to look back on this election and wish we had done more. **I’m reaching out one last time because you’re a valuable member of our team, Derek: Can we count on you to vote for Joe Biden?**
[ **COUNT ME IN** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM2M9gL1cn4MYrCvNs66DwQauT4FyWTMemPWzHzs0J1XwwT2vEHmQaHePz1e0rxjpK4_L6ElC-0xK5uRfrRVXo4KBhzjDDF-7J5wXlzkVoPFj5Io3IbqZQ-gC9sDl8inno3r7IukibtGgrFHT3qhpt9JYzNYsJy8odFkacv3wZi83XF74GV1PG45xNPbDfyZR8LwTv-gEpFPkEjP4r5RS4f1Fh3znJl9dEOHlS_pIyyDesCTPOqnNlIupeZl3yWnFp7XIT_g5fGRIQE5rN6lQzPRx6bRb7oT70v9WRvE-4FRHy4it0GW8MiOZSy1IU7NpVeK8jug2by99gyDGpkGQCI4Dpe-qbb7xD2T8OflVbTANgW52D1FGHXpu0x2EYEk5GQBIIf-0YeTvxoCmqR44ISQnnYKIyBr5fQdmXtxzNQO5DCIGwZZYYnp58e5gTDTD8j0vLIKaL_iv0zofr7YWPmYoTuehkj9IvfcuihTQtbY2A/35t/Z0njmChiSkiLxQMPpCmFMw/h0/5cbTXbtDvoMHX6juXWZrBbFt4mfuC-bwAJU7ljF6dQA)

clean_body: Asking one last time: Can we count on you to help Democrats win this year? | | Derek -- are you with us? No less than the future of our democracy is at stake in this election, and no one candidate can do it alone. Reversing the damage of the last four years and building a future with our Democratic values will take all of us doing what we can, when we can, little by little through November 3. I remember waking up after Election Day in 2016 like it was yesterday, and I know none of us want to look back on this election and wish we had done more. I’m reaching out one last time because you’re a valuable member of our team, Derek: Can we count on you to vote for Joe Biden? I’m deeply proud of the support we’ve built for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we value every member of this team. But according to our records, Derek, you have yet to let us know that you’re going to help defeat Republicans and elect Democrats nationwide. In unity, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee P.S. Democrats are working hard to win big this November: Are you in?

name: MJ
subject: We've got what it takes, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---

| | Look, Peter, I've got what it takes to win this race, but I'm going to need your help.

People told me that running against Sen. Cornyn would be a tough fight -- and they're right. This is Texas. John Cornyn has been around Washington for 18 years. He's the puppet of shady Washington special interests that are pouring millions of dollars into this race to save him.

But here's the thing about me -- I'm a fighter. Always have been.

**And I don't give up.**

Sen. Cornyn doesn't scare me. His special interests and corporate PACs don't scare me either, even when they put out ads attacking me and trying to paint me as a "radical." I've faced much scarier things in life -- like when my crew and I faced down the Taliban. We stayed focused on the mission, and made it out together.

I wasn't alone that day, and I'm not alone today. Tough battles can only be won by tough teams, and I'm lucky to have one of the strongest. **[Can I count on you and the rest of our grassroots army to see this fight through?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cb0/7f51f7bc/475c18dc/4efb9576/3359639025/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201007.2nd__2257__&amount=10")**

We have less than a month left in this fight, and we'll win this -- as a team -- if we don't for one second let up.

**Are you with me, Peter?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cb0/7f51f7bc/475c18dc/4efb9575/3359639025/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201007.2nd__2257__&amount=5")**

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: not going well
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek,
I just got an update from my team about October fundraising and wanted to give it to you straight: **_It’s not going well._** I’m alarmed because on Monday Trump tweeted that Virginia is “IN PLAY.” His campaign isn’t taking anything for granted and we can’t either. Look, this isn’t just about winning. It’s about running up as big a margin as we can in Virginia so Donald Trump can’t play games with the result. He’s dangerous and we can’t take anything for granted with so much at stake for the future of our country. **[Please contribute anything you can to support my effort to help Virginia Democrats win up and down the ticket in 2020.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkRkHmtLQQI5iSwMyf3fB4YlM2rHn6uY4y5IK_6p6nB_7atuXs6ceV8JyqIf1HoIz93-pcsjHmxL0vysBwT-0AtbjLLrJ5nlqk0Mzc4vANyZd8mBAjRyETfRNlyqjQM7l-p0u4_5ppPWSPqAPWrKjFy5-JD6wplXvgi0cPr0oIVf56wDuX-ybAiczlO7NK2jm2bpPCCrK0a_B458bRMDs8Qt_JlD7GZi_svLzrQ1YQeCBIZvIO0sFtMKGdwzEFMUMmLKWuLQfU_0ZsMKp8UZp0_Q/35t/isywWnXgSYStPXJ_2Rx8kw/h0/pQJaKl2DiT163UVLgIT8-daifWu9PBO7s9Y7ltnXsZw) ** Let’s get to work, Terry

| Patriot,
Don't forget to tune in tonight to the Vice Presidential Debate!
The debate will take place in Salt Lake City at 9:00pm, and you can live stream it from home.
Our Vice President Mike Pence will be squaring off on the debate floor against Kamala Harris.
Each candidate will lay out their party's agenda for the next four years. I know I'll be watching, [will you? ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PSKbCqjYFeyfvsj3ZVst7ZS4WxMnEXNvrbBXRuhh7y-aVrVk8M6xzGGXp553ClA63dQ-4W1D7qNbByeev6TilPsYLWHGndtnBJJ-7GoSZ8PMidMLgl6OHU5SPfMupz9ckwXq9DqKjCs0NHvFALvmvfuvTCwztqm35jBCQte1ROdfNGuZYoL0AQ==&c=Rxq9lvi37bGaKg9Tj-gRERwm1u22MmXG_EBgI8CB8mlToa0g4v7OoQ==&ch=-guHplsFeuZXKjEPYr51Z5irQkEod4FWattrMa6BywvCtp7r8cOnvg==)

| Even though many of us already know who we're voting for, it's still our patriotic duty to stay informed on the issues. It's especially important for undecided voters to watch these debates too, so grab your friends and neighbors and watch the debate together!
Spreading the message and keeping people informed is the only way we can ensure a WIN on Election Day.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Today is a HUGE milestone in this campaign. Not only are we LESS THAN ONE MONTH UNTIL ELECTION DAY but TODAY IS THE SECOND DAY OF VOTING in New Mexico. We are all aware that an increased number of absentee ballots may cause delays in the final count of votes. If you want to ensure your ballot is received and counted on Election Day, it is imperative that you RETURN YOUR BALLOT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE! Whether you are voting absentee, early or on Election Day, or voting absentee, I need your help to ensure every New Mexican knows how to make their vote count. | It is unbelievable that voting has already begun. Krysty and I, and our entire team, are so thankful for the support we have received from New Mexicans across the state. Running to be your next US Senator has been the honor of my life, but it will pale in comparison to the honor I will feel representing you in the United States Senate. If you can, | | | Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. We are only one month out from election day and today is the second day you can return your absentee ballot! Make sure you return your absentee ballot AS SOON AS POSSIBLE! And if you can, | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Randy=20Feenstra?=
subject: Do you know who's paying for these attack ads?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Yesterday, I got the chance to see the attack ads my opponent has spent almost a million dollars on. I was watching TV with my family, and all I could do was shake my head. It’s frustrating to see such dishonest, desperate attempts to attack my character, but it’s par for the course – it’s expected, and we need to push back.
---
| [Help Push Back](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ecbe67ac3d&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Help Push Back")
---
| What _really_ bothers me is where the money for these ads is coming from.

It isn’t coming from voters in the Fourth District that want to see my opponent elected – it’s not even coming from _Iowa._ Over the course of the years he’s been running for Congress, more than **_EIGHTY PERCENT_** of the millions of dollars he’s raised have come from rich liberals in California and the East Coast.

My opponent keeps telling people he rejected money from the DCCC, and that he wants to keep his campaign “in Iowa”, but time and time again takes big dollar donations from progressive extremists that have no interest in Iowa! They don’t care about us. They don’t care about farmers, or our schools, or our communities – they care about getting another Democrat in Congress that will vote for their agenda.

And my opponent has taken millions of their dollars to spend on attack ads against me.

I need your help to push back against these dishonest attacks bankrolled by donors trying to buy Nancy Pelosi another vote. If you’re tired of the dishonesty and the outside influence, please, consider chipping in $5, $10, or $20 by clicking the button below – and thank you for the support, it truly means a lot.
---
| [Click Here to Help Out](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=52999bfc26&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click Here to Help Out")
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323
[Add us to your address book](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4&c=413e2928d4).

Be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=1958169553&e=d48ad6f8f4), [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b7e7334ac6&e=d48ad6f8f4), and [Instagram](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=17edf75ad8&e=d48ad6f8f4). name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20McCarver=20=2D=20TeamDani?=
subject: Help us win this race from the comfort of your own couch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6e0a71a33923/help-us-win-this-race-from-the-comfort-of-your-own-couch?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We've got less than 4 weeks to go until Election Day and that means we need all hands on deck to help us win this race!

We're having a Weekend of Action this Friday, October 9th through Sunday the 11th, and [we need you to sign up for a shift to help us call voters from the comfort of your own home! ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a79d253d8f&e=140a9b81e7)Throughout the weekend, we'll make sure that someone from our team is available to help you answer any questions you have while you're on the phones, and we'll provide you with everything you need to make the calls!

**We are truly in the final stretch of this election now** , and tens of thousands of people have already cast their ballots in IL-16. We need your help on the phones to make sure we are reaching as many voters as possible, starting this weekend!

Dave McCarver
Team Dani

P.S. We are also looking for volunteers to help us out on Election Day this year. You can [click here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7c618c7f49&e=140a9b81e7) to sign up to be an Election Day volunteer!

---
| [Click here to join us for our Weekend of Action!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1b11b0f543&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to join us for our Weekend of Action!")
---
| |
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Dani for Illinois
PO Box 1671
LaSalle, IL 61301

You can [update your preferences](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7&c=9cb43577a1).

ALL GIFTS 825%-MATCHED UNTIL THE END OF THE DEBATE.

subject: One. Point. Down.

body:

---|---
**45 % | **46 %****

**[Rush a donation of $5 or more right now to close the gap>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf65/29776869/8b4083d/569e20aa/236876690/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMDdfcG9sbF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201007_poll_in")**

Peter,

We're _so close_. Recent polling has us within **_one point_** of Mike Garcia -- well within the margin of error.

Republicans are counting on 25 years of GOP control to help them keep this seat red for another 25 years -- **but this poll shows that the folks of CA-25 are ready to take this district back for _people_ , not special interests and partisan politics.**

We can't slow down now, Peter. We have to keep up the amazing momentum we've built over the last year and close the gap between us and Mike -- in the last 27 days before November 3rd, we need to pull ahead and take control of this race.

But to do that, we'll need real resources. We have to get Christy's message of responsible, bipartisan leadership in front of every possible voter if we're going to increase our numbers.

That will only be possible with your support. **Unlike Mike Garcia, we'll _never_ take money from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists, so we really do count on folks like you to chip in what you can to flip this seat.**

**[Donate $5 or more right now to help close this one-point gap and send Mike Garcia packing>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf65/29776869/8b4083d/569e20aa/236876690/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMDdfcG9sbF9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201007_poll_in")**
