name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: 1️⃣2️⃣3️⃣4️⃣5️⃣ things to know before tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Get your copy of our exclusive press memo.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3498%2E53494%2ES_dp5a) Friend, In response to pressure from climate activists across the country, Fox News' Chris Wallace broke from his own debate agenda last week to question the presidential candidates on climate change. It was the first time in 12 years that a moderator raised the issue of climate change in a presidential debate, and we're glad Wallace broke the streak. But his questions violated two best practices for covering climate change. Now, Evergreen's press team is helping future moderators and journalists -- along with anyone who reads their news with a critical eye -- avoid making the same mistakes during this presidential and vice presidential debate season. **[We've done the wonky legwork and put together a memo to help the press cover and voters discern the press coverage of the climate crisis more effectively -- and in preparation for tonight's debate, we're sharing it with you, too. Click here to download and read our exclusive memo.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1010?t=3&akid=3498%2E53494%2ES_dp5a)** | [GET THE MEMO ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1010?t=4&akid=3498%2E53494%2ES_dp5a)
---
The five-point memo is designed to help journalists and moderators frame climate questions and stories in a way that reflects the latest science and what's at stake.
For instance (Chris, are you listening?), don't ask whether or not a candidate "believes" or accepts the science behind climate change. After decades of inaction, "belief" is no longer an acceptable baseline.
Another tip? Climate shouldn't be siloed into its own standalone issue. The climate crisis is inextricable from issues of racial justice, national security, public health, and more. It should be treated as such in these debates when millions of Americans are watching.
**[Want more tips before the VP debate tonight? Download the exclusive Evergreen press memo right now so you can root out which debate questions pass muster.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1012?t=5&akid=3498%2E53494%2ES_dp5a)**
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action
[GET THE MEMO ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1010?t=6&akid=3498%2E53494%2ES_dp5a)
---

clean_body: Get your copy of our exclusive press memo. | Friend, In response to pressure from climate activists across the country, Fox News' Chris Wallace broke from his own debate agenda last week to question the presidential candidates on climate change. It was the first time in 12 years that a moderator raised the issue of climate change in a presidential debate, and we're glad Wallace broke the streak. But his questions violated two best practices for covering climate change. Now, Evergreen's press team is helping future moderators and journalists -- along with anyone who reads their news with a critical eye -- avoid making the same mistakes during this presidential and vice presidential debate season. | The five-point memo is designed to help journalists and moderators frame climate questions and stories in a way that reflects the latest science and what's at stake. For instance (Chris, are you listening?), don't ask whether or not a candidate "believes" or accepts the science behind climate change. After decades of inaction, "belief" is no longer an acceptable baseline. Another tip? Climate shouldn't be siloed into its own standalone issue. The climate crisis is inextricable from issues of racial justice, national security, public health, and more. It should be treated as such in these debates when millions of Americans are watching. Thanks, Jamal Raad Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Planning ahead for a COVID-19 vaccine
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello,
Yesterday, I discussed how important getting your flu shot is to our efforts to prevent the spread of COVID-19. One of the key reasons that Rhode Island has been a national leader in flu vaccination is that we have built the infrastructure to make getting your shot easy, fast, and inexpensive no matter where you live in the state.
Rhode Island's leading vaccine program is governed by the State's Vaccine Advisory Committee. Today, I announced that I am convening a special subcommittee of this group with the sole focus of planning for the COVID-19 vaccine.
---
|
---
| This [subcommittee](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zD1e5lQmiJzsINDqiJiCtJ_GReUk0fCghhRF57KVXvll76YVJGTli_KoOL4kiWZBzNCIV8Xa3WWmXWJOci1IgC7AuFZIVbTgL5rDTri7lYhaJXnUNJqBer-kC3I5rzRiTG8TWhpPA2VKZieSlJVsEvaYjxX4tKfUwoS7PHqf7Jc=&c=MfTmDA36J16rMIXwJPQfIbppnTWz1fJp7lvHUsecmC9SlYwxikcxlQ==&ch=q0y0rSZUtVavTs9LD7lkmGgzwflGHwJbdX1enDhBPdwuOHB5Ifac7g==) is comprised of epidemiologists, primary care providers, pharmacists, pediatricians, long-term care advocates, ethicists, nonprofit leaders, school leaders, faith leaders and others. We are lucky to have so many expert voices in Rhode Island to advise us on one of the most important aspects of our COVID-19 response and recovery. The subcommittee will be tasked with two specific things:

* First, the subcommittee will be responsible for developing an independent process for evaluating the vaccine's safety and efficacy. Dr. Alexander-Scott and I will not approve of any vaccine being distributed to Rhode Islanders unless we are absolutely confident in its safety.

* Second, the subcommittee will advise us on prioritizing the distribution of the vaccines to make sure we give ourselves the best chance of protecting Rhode Islanders and speeding up our recovery.

And let me be clear: a vaccine will not be a quick ticket out of this pandemic. It takes time for vaccines to be distributed and for vaccine immunity to catch on. It takes even more time for viral immunity to be established without a vaccine. The emergence of a vaccine won't end COVID at the flip of a switch - we'll be living with this virus for more than a year.
What it will do is speed up the timeline back toward a full sense of normalcy. It's another tool - along with masks, and social distancing, and every other tool we have - that, taken together, will allow us to accelerate our state and national reopening.
So, we're being very cautious, and there's still a lot we don't know. And I know there's a lot of information out there, and every day there's something new in the news about the status of COVID-19 vaccine trials. I also know there's a lot of uncertainty and concern. So, when it comes to vaccines, I'm going to do what I've done every stage of this crisis: I'm going to be upfront and transparent, I'm going to tell you what we know and what we don't know, and I'm going to update you each step along the way.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zD1e5lQmiJzsINDqiJiCtJ_GReUk0fCghhRF57KVXvll76YVJGTli_KoOL4kiWZB2DeMcFRUe3TyVpsj3_wIBn2G_2oH9404GHsoGltsOG5_hFPNPJsTUOzKwfutkJ2Wfi-qEm-2LjcSYRsLePlrR3M1x-98uM1cFJCo6bWwtmWfr_bOeVNnqpjmsGdFLWsWxuc_i4-zoSxNiQrStgf0ejBVf3dPvxbLDk13yfc-Tk-MMiGPPuFQR8Xk-9cM67ke-73PfIPF6wman0QQvGy66HW725n6PNgQpr95-6rqjZNwxbyHnF_BJtSKLpRQA4GtLGVHCFGYy-M=&c=MfTmDA36J16rMIXwJPQfIbppnTWz1fJp7lvHUsecmC9SlYwxikcxlQ==&ch=q0y0rSZUtVavTs9LD7lkmGgzwflGHwJbdX1enDhBPdwuOHB5Ifac7g==).
---

It is because of YOU that America is the greatest Country in the world, and it is because of President Trump that we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! We only have a few hours left to hit our fundraising goal. You’ve always been one of our strongest supporters - so we’re doing something BIG in the hopes that you’ll step up during this critical time. 850%-MATCH ACTIVATED TO CRUSH OUR GOAL! I’ve requested a list of every Debate Day Donor and want to make sure your name is at the very top! I know you care about our Nation’s future as much as I do. Can the President and I count on you to help us WIN BIG? Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to stand with President Trump and me and to have your contribution 850%-MATCHED. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 = $190 CONTRIBUTE $15 = $143 CONTRIBUTE $10 = $95 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $48 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT We need you right now. There are less than FOUR WEEKS remaining until Election Day, and we need EVERY American to help us WIN BIG. Contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW for an 850%-MATCH. Thank you, Mike Pence Vice President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 = $48 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Neither printed nor produced at government expense. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. name: NH Senate GOP Victory 2020
subject: Let's talk education...

| Friends, Let's talk about which NH Senate candidates are offering real choice in education reform and improvement here in New Hampshire. Over the past few years, Governor Sununu and the New Hampshire Republicans have led the way on true education reform in our state. Republicans have fought to give parents more control over where their children go to school - after all, it is the parent who best knows how a child learns. Additionally, NH Republicans have championed student safety. Thanks to the efforts of Senate Republicans this past session, the state passed new laws protecting our students from inappropriate student-teacher relationships. Meanwhile, NH Democrats have done everything that they can to prevent our schools from improving. Just this past month, the four opponents of these Republican candidates once again blocked the state from accepting a $46 million federal grant for charter schools which enhances school choice for parents. They fear educational choice and opportunity will loosen the influence of their political allies. Remember, when it comes to education, Republicans want what is best for parents and students. Republicans understand that students need an opportunity to thrive not a one size fits all approach to learning. Below find our list of the top Republican champions for New Hampshire education reform:

name: Team Warren
subject: re: Trump's announcement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It's clear: Trump and his Republican enablers don't care about providing real relief for families suffering through this pandemic. So in the next four weeks, we need to do everything we can to get Rep | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d7/45c30650/1c6f4c671/66e882a0/533324710/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
For months now, House Democrats have been passing bills to deliver urgent relief to families, small businesses, and state and local governments during this health and economic crisis.

But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have blocked those bills at every turn -- while getting ready to ram through a Supreme Court nominee to rip away health care from millions of Americans.

**And yesterday, Donald Trump cut off negotiations for comprehensive relief before the election.**

It's clear: Trump and his Republican enablers don't care about providing real relief for families suffering through this pandemic. So in the next four weeks, we need to do everything we can to get Republicans out of power. That means defeating Trump, taking back the Senate, expanding our House majority, and electing Democrats across the country who put people first.

**[If you're able to, please chip in $2 or whatever makes sense for you to help elect Democrats like Elizabeth this year and beyond. She's now endorsed 129 Warren Democrats running up and down the ballot-- and they're counting on grassroots support from this team. ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d7/45c30650/1c6f4c671/66e882a3/533324710/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDNGX0VHUl9HUk1fVF8yMDIwMTAwN19WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW03F_EGR_GRM_T_20201007_V1S3_P")**

Democrats know that we need to take action now to help people who are out of work, going hungry, and struggling to pay rent.

But Republicans care more about catering to right-wing extremists and stealing another Supreme Court seat.

This election will decide whether we can have a government that works for everyone -- or one that continues to reward the rich and powerful.

Grassroots organizing will make the difference in tight races across the country, but it's only possible with the support of grassroots donors like you

**[If you're ready to send Trump's Republican enablers packing, and if you can make a financial contribution right now, will you donate to support Warren Democrats?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d7/45c30650/1c6f4c671/66e882a3/533324710/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMDNGX0VHUl9HUk1fVF8yMDIwMTAwN19WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW03F_EGR_GRM_T_20201007_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Derek, will you take Mark's Fall Issues survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

As we near one of the most consequential elections of our lifetimes, Mark Warner is continuing to work hard on the issues that matter most to Virginians. **He wants to hear from you, Derek.**

Throughout the pandemic Mark led efforts to keep Virginians safe and financially secure. He's fought to protect the U.S. Postal Service and guard the integrity of our elections. And he continues to work to make life better for Virginians on many fronts: ensuring our economy works for everyone, expanding access to affordable health care, and improving care for our veterans.

Now, as he heads toward an especially busy legislative session on Capitol Hill, Mark wants to know: **[What issues do you want him to focus on?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da41/53d9897e/55af591c/1c88ed56/2383288443/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-fallsurvey")** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da41/53d9897e/55af591c/1c88ed56/2383288443/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-fallsurvey")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - celebrating Hoosier farmers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Hoosier farmers are the backbone of our state, and this week’s One Indiana is all about celebrating the incredible products coming out of Indiana’s... [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ae9b7a6ffc9b46deb3a2ffaef55dbc74&_e=t8-ZuqUZpum2bOlkI4udcdxNLeYkE9IZv9IdDy-IZmxIlj7qkvKGlmB991M4VhAmfCKyQ6DvLa_wPBHd1pYySwpqseLIQrMlLwR3qGqt-1GibKkya5KRyqssMxSCRF5NbY3kbtnvHC18S69DJgOmjw7ytx3z8zRHNGqiuMS0VU9DOsSW7-rCzk02AfhDwnDiBI7aVUEYn8KWdj9gRNiP3c2qjZ8-5yZ-ziamJ8GGCwpJm2zBq0j0Tk66duyHsFOr98vgWr2BFOXKirO7Pi7pLHgUeWWo9gPKk5k131seChQGbRT6fcRNzOpFy7-uddXClDUFNgAWXkV_kd30Lh3H3fGrjfavjsiU7-rkuuwuCZ5yZkYh-xZyZEbxSI-u59omqrly_qjmKWa8EEqTbbWS0jWjXQcXAxm9JkauEi0DRQcBnxyObY_IE3HSX5_yWgvN0FbSX6hww09SlTbF7SDv6w%3D%3D) Friends, Agriculture is Indiana’s calling card, and has been for over 200 years. As we celebrate fall harvest, this week’s One Indiana is all about celebrating the incredible products coming out of Indiana’s farms. **Farmers contribute an estimated $31.2 billion to Indiana’s economy!** We’re the 10th largest farming state in the entire country, and the 8th largest agricultural exporter — exporting over $4.6 billion worth of ag products --and growing! (pun intended) There are 94,000 farmers in Indiana, and 96% of the farms in our state are family-owned or operated. Hoosier farmers get up early and work hard to make sure that Americans have access to the incredible bounty coming out of Indiana and they deserve to be recognized for their efforts. Check out just some of the areas our agriculture industry is leading the way below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ae9b7a6ffc9b46deb3a2ffaef55dbc74&_e=t8-ZuqUZpum2bOlkI4udcdxNLeYkE9IZv9IdDy-IZmxIlj7qkvKGlmB991M4VhAmfCKyQ6DvLa_wPBHd1pYySwpqseLIQrMlLwR3qGqt-1GibKkya5KRyqssMxSCRF5NbY3kbtnvHC18S69DJgOmjw7ytx3z8zRHNGqiuMS0VU9DOsSW7-rCzk02AfhDwnDiBI7aVUEYn8KWdj9gRNiP3c2qjZ8-5yZ-ziamJ8GGCwpJm2zBq0j0Tk66duyHsFOr0vyGWiEYsoDEP9e8MT22RxQ-Es6RaHLguvUaEdtgTQ6C6mRwLWmjsg5qAAFTbvg7bKc7D-DeasO7ATEVsyj6OuhXqj0WVP0sxQnCrxhBXdFrAvCnv6MaWc1WPCPfasFhyYdvyIzfuB4062ZG9LhR_tL4bbxH0nyDLe1MtAM057_V3UAUp3ou2vIZUzqlmbifn7JF7c1CDJzXR_luj8dkkg%3D%3D)
* **Corn** \- Hoosier farmers sold $3.28 billion worth of corn in 2017, making it the number one commodity by sales value in our state! We’re also #2 in the entire country in popcorn production, so next time you settle down for a movie with a bowl of popcorn you can thank our Hoosier farmers!
* **Duck** \- Man, it feels good to be #1. Hoosier farmers lead the entire country in duck production and make many fine-dining classics like duck a l’orange, duck confit, and Peking duck possible.
* **Soybeans** \- The second largest commodity by sales value, soybeans are a crucial part of Indiana’s economy and Hoosier farmers sold $3.08 billion worth of soybeans in 2017.
* **Spearmint and peppermint** \- What’s that fresh smell? It’s all of that spearmint and peppermint being produced by Hoosier farmers. We’re the #3 spearmint producer and the #4 peppermint producer in the entire country!
* **Pork** \- Hoosiers love their pork tenderloins, so it’s no surprise we’re top 5 in hog production. There are currently more than 4.2 million hogs in Indiana - man, that’s a lot of pork!
* **Melons** \- Another commodity, another top 5 finish for Hoosier farmers. We produce the fifth most watermelons in the country — an American summer classic!
* **Dairy** \- The #5 agricultural commodity in Indiana, Hoosier farmers produce $750 million worth of dairy products a year from 187,000 cows. Have a sweet tooth? Our farmers have you covered — we’re the #2 ice cream producer in the entire country!
* **Poultry and eggs** \- Another top #5 Hoosier commodity, there are more than 20.5 million turkeys alone in Indiana and our farmers sell more than $1.18 billion worth of poultry and eggs a year!

Want to learn more about our booming agriculture industry and the great Hoosier products coming out of our state? **[Check out the Indiana State Department of Agriculture Website!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ae9b7a6ffc9b46deb3a2ffaef55dbc74&_e=t8-ZuqUZpum2bOlkI4udcdxNLeYkE9IZv9IdDy-IZmxIlj7qkvKGlmB991M4VhAmfCKyQ6DvLa_wPBHd1pYySwpqseLIQrMlLwR3qGqt-1GibKkya5KRyqssMxSCRF5NbY3kbtnvHC18S69DJgOmjw7ytx3z8zRHNGqiuMS0VU9DOsSW7-rCzk02AfhDwnDiBI7aVUEYn8KWdj9gRNiP3c2qjZ8-5yZ-ziamJ8GGCwpJm2zBq0j0Tk66duyHsFOrNj83QwMq0EtQwhbkPvZaC_atkKZkmKpDp2Bn_wbq2WvZc-OPkSpLE2df5QqSa8T3BIYc7Eid_Hkst_wkn_opfo29huONXsCbPmjSDfUFouJ2TX0RH0NooZi6uxS5drU1EzTJOOShPFbw4BPEah_X1XrPKAwjdq-pqD-VQhiIUDzeZ7jcf-JcGJI3xfQDQG1458irou4QbLi_3hd4hihHNQ%3D%3D)** [**Get more facts on Indiana Agriculture**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ae9b7a6ffc9b46deb3a2ffaef55dbc74&_e=t8-ZuqUZpum2bOlkI4udcdxNLeYkE9IZv9IdDy-IZmxIlj7qkvKGlmB991M4VhAmfCKyQ6DvLa_wPBHd1pYySwpqseLIQrMlLwR3qGqt-1GibKkya5KRyqssMxSCRF5NbY3kbtnvHC18S69DJgOmjw7ytx3z8zRHNGqiuMS0VU9DOsSW7-rCzk02AfhDwnDiBI7aVUEYn8KWdj9gRNiP3c2qjZ8-5yZ-ziamJ8GGCwpJm2zBq0j0Tk66duyHsFOrQ5bgLnVy16Z2zz_1CuMst6ZA7bf0SeRi1kcgtZ4ltbYd3PWh_nNYEFgCoPhhoBirrHSbavWYTS0oUrK0Gy---3LiYPBmRnIKRt1jZn-TRXcSdo8yaMM8l3zZ-KYxeFU6KFeUi5wf6Xn6rLmlaxqQYu1wQeOTFWnPfZLT_Vnb8bDFez7ZeaxTJUDQnwRIhG0x4fUs6CpILercJHhTCz73wQ%3D%3D) Thanks for reading, Holcomb Crew | |

clean_body: Hoosier farmers are the backbone of our state, and this week’s One Indiana is all about celebrating the incredible products coming out of Indiana’s... Friends, Agriculture is Indiana’s calling card, and has been for over 200 years. As we celebrate fall harvest, this week’s One Indiana is all about celebrating the incredible products coming out of Indiana’s farms. Farmers contribute an estimated $31.2 billion to Indiana’s economy! We’re the 10th largest farming state in the entire country, and the 8th largest agricultural exporter — exporting over $4.6 billion worth of ag products --and growing! (pun intended) There are 94,000 farmers in Indiana, and 96% of the farms in our state are family-owned or operated. Hoosier farmers get up early and work hard to make sure that Americans have access to the incredible bounty coming out of Indiana and they deserve to be recognized for their efforts. Check out just some of the areas our agriculture industry is leading the way below! Corn \- Hoosier farmers sold $3.28 billion worth of corn in 2017, making it the number one commodity by sales value in our state! We’re also #2 in the entire country in popcorn production, so next time you settle down for a movie with a bowl of popcorn you can thank our Hoosier farmers! Duck \- Man, it feels good to be #1. Hoosier farmers lead the entire country in duck production and make many fine-dining classics like duck a l’orange, duck confit, and Peking duck possible. Soybeans \- The second largest commodity by sales value, soybeans are a crucial part of Indiana’s economy and Hoosier farmers sold $3.08 billion worth of soybeans in 2017. Spearmint and peppermint \- What’s that fresh smell? It’s all of that spearmint and peppermint being produced by Hoosier farmers. We’re the #3 spearmint producer and the #4 peppermint producer in the entire country! Pork \- Hoosiers love their pork tenderloins, so it’s no surprise we’re top 5 in hog production. There are currently more than 4.2 million hogs in Indiana - man, that’s a lot of pork! Melons \- Another commodity, another top 5 finish for Hoosier farmers. We produce the fifth most watermelons in the country — an American summer classic! Dairy \- The #5 agricultural commodity in Indiana, Hoosier farmers produce $750 million worth of dairy products a year from 187,000 cows. Have a sweet tooth? Our farmers have you covered — we’re the #2 ice cream producer in the entire country! Poultry and eggs \- Another top #5 Hoosier commodity, there are more than 20.5 million turkeys alone in Indiana and our farmers sell more than $1.18 billion worth of poultry and eggs a year! Want to learn more about our booming agriculture industry and the great Hoosier products coming out of our state? Thanks for reading, Holcomb Crew | | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Roger Stone
subject: Sick and tired of seeing left wing democrats?
body:
Are you sick and tired of seeing left wing democrats like Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, Jerry Nadler and Chuck Schumer attacking the President,
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396422-933564-5230958-f085e58dfb-adf6d53ca3)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396422-933564-5230958-f085e58dfb-adf6d53ca3) Are you sick and tired of seeing left wing democrats like Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, Jerry Nadler and Chuck Schumer attacking the President, praising the socialist criminals who are rioting, burning buildings and assaulting citizens in our streets and basically undermining America?

Are you tired of democrats refusing to denounce the violence in our streets and communities?

If you agree that it's time for more leaders to call these radical socialists out then please read on.

I have watched as Pelsosi, Nadler, Schiff, Swallwell, Liu, Deutsch and other left-wing Democrats have smeared our President - with only a handful of Republicans rising to defend us.

If you are like me, you have also noticed that it is only a very small handful of Republicans who are willing to stand up to these demagogues and fight back; Congressman Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, Lee Seldin, Doug Collins and Louie Gohmert and less than a handful of others.

It is imperative that we do something about this. So many of the establishment Republicans just keep their heads down and refuse to fight for the President's agenda or for the good of the country.

That is why I am writing you on behalf of Laura Loomer today. Laura Loomer is an exceptional conservative candidate for Congress who recently won her multi-candidate republican primary with 42% of the vote. Laura Loomer is precisely the type of tough, fearless conservative that President Trump needs in the House to support his reform agenda and to confront democrats like Schiff, Nadler and Pelosi and refute their tsunami of lies and distortions.

While it is vitally important that we re-elect President Trump, it is also essential that we keep control of the US Senate and regain control of the US House to end the reign of terror by Nancy Pelosi and her radical comrades Ilhan Omar, Rashida Talib and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

I feel so strongly about the need to send reinforcements to true conservative leaders in the Congress like Matt Gaetz and Jim Jordan that I want you to support Laura Loomer for Congress. I have identified Laura Loomer as one of the most dynamic young conservatives running for congress anywhere in America today.

I'm not the only one. Congressman Matt Gaetz - the President's #1 supporter in Congress has warmly endorsed Laura Loomer in the 21st district congressional race.

Laura Loomer is not a politician, she is an independent journalist and an outspoken critic of radical Islamic terrorism. Laura Loomer supports a reform agenda for America and will fight in Congress to keep President Trump's tax cuts and cuts in regulations in place. Laura Loomer will fight to secure our borders, protect our 2nd Amendment rights, fight all efforts to defund our police and maintain the safety and security of our streets and neighborhoods as well as opposing cuts in Social Security.

Most importantly, Laura Loomer is not the kind of person who will go to Washington and immediately forget where she came from and what she believes in. Laura Loomer is a deeply principled conservative who believes in the US Constitution, smaller less intrusive government, a strong military, supporting our police and an aggressive stance towards radical Islamic terrorism.

Since the President's courageous decision to commute my sentence, many Republican candidates for Congress have asked for my endorsement or have asked me to campaign for them. Frankly, I don't really have the time to research every candidate who has asked but in the case of Laura Loomer I had to make an exception.

I look forward to the day that Laura Loomer takes on Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and exposes them for the anti-Semites and socialists that they are. [**Please act today to send your maximum personal contribution to Laura Loomer’s campaign by going here**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396422-933564-5230958-f085e58dfb-adf6d53ca3).

Again, Laura Loomer is one of the very few Congressional candidates that I will actively support as I will spend most of my time working independently to reelect the President.

[**Please help her with your contribution today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396422-933564-5230958-f085e58dfb-adf6d53ca3)

God Bless You,

Roger Stone

PS- An expert analysis of the polling in Laura loomer’s district shows that although the district has a modest democrat voter edge, she has a _very real chance of victory_ because many democrats are turned off by Laura’s opponent’s failure to denounce the radical socialist agenda promulgated by the so-called “Squad” of Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. I am confident that [**with your immediate help**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396422-933564-5230958-f085e58dfb-adf6d53ca3), Laura Loomer can win.

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-396422-933564-84585d41bbe610b-adf6d53ca3)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Can I have a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
This is Captain Mark Kelly, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona. Patty asked me to reach out to you. In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between our campaigns for Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
In this final month leading up to the election, we've set our biggest fundraising goal ever, and we need to make sure we hit this goal because Mitch McConnell has pledged to spend millions on ads in Arizona against me and our campaign.
He has the money to keep these ads running right up until Election Day and we can't afford to let his attacks on us go unanswered -- we need to set the record straight.
Which is why I'm hoping that we can get a lot of donations today to help us in the final 27 days of this race. So what do you say?
**[If you are able, will you split a donation between our people-powered campaign and Patty Murray? We can't afford to fall short of this goal, not when Mitch McConnell is spending millions on ads to defeat us and hold control of the Senate.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201007-mark-kelly?refcode=em201007i_505&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Making the decision to reject corporate PAC money was a big risk, but one that was important to me. Instead, we're funding this campaign by harnessing the power of grassroots energy -- and it's paying off big!
So just know that every time you decide to chip in $3, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford, it allows us to go head-to-head with Mitch McConnell and win.
Thank you again for all of your support.
Mark

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201007-mark-kelly?refcode=em201007i_505&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933bd/22080b68/7a449436/46021690/1824001139/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933bd/22080b68/7a449436/46021697/1824001139/VEsC/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The fastest recovery in history!
body:
11.4 million. That’s how many new jobs the U.S. economy has added since May—when experts were still predicting that... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c575d459b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 7, 2020
---
| | |
# **The fastest recovery in history!**

**11.4 million.** That’s how many new jobs the U.S. economy has added since May—when experts were still predicting that the unemployment rate would hit 20 percent and that American job losses would continue to mount for months to come.

**Instead, President Trump** has led what is on track to be the fastest economic recovery in U.S. history, the Council of Economic Advisers says. During the last five months, more than half of all job losses from the pandemic have already been recovered.

📖 [**NEW: Trump Administration takes action on foreign worker visas**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=63f0ef44df&e=3ee4985eea)

**That’s no accident.** Following the Great Recession, the Obama-led “recovery” required over two years to achieve an unemployment rate of 8.4 percent. Under President Trump, Americans accomplished that goal in _one month_ earlier this year.

**Two big reasons** explain the difference. The first is that President Trump’s pro-growth, pro-worker agenda makes our economy’s fundamentals stronger. In 2019, before Coronavirus swept the world, [**American incomes hit a record high**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b0c6741a5&e=3ee4985eea) while U.S. poverty rates hit a record low. Median incomes saw their biggest one-year jump ever.

**When America is strong,** it can withstand any global recession and bounce back quickly. President Trump cut taxes, fixed overregulation, replaced NAFTA, brought back manufacturing jobs, and held China and others accountable for breaking trade rules.

**The second reason** is that President Trump took targeted action to help American workers and families after the Coronavirus outbreak.

**Instead of exploiting** the global crisis to grow the reach of government and pass unrelated legislation—something Democrats love to do—the Trump Administration negotiated the CARES Act, implemented the Paycheck Protection Program, extended supplemental unemployment benefits, paused student loan payments, and halted evictions.

**Just yesterday,** the Administration took more action to protect American jobs by tightening the requirements on foreign worker visas. A new rule will limit the ability of corporations to replace American workers with cheap foreign labor—especially important as our economy reopens from the pandemic and more of our citizens look for jobs.

**“No one can compete** with American workers when they’re given a fair and level playing field, which has not happened for decades,” President Trump said.

**Democrats in Congress,** unfortunately, aren’t interested in more bipartisan, targeted relief. Instead, Speaker Nancy Pelosi stuffed her bill with a far-left activist wish list, including ending voter ID requirements and bailing out profligate state governments.

**🎬** [**WATCH: Speaker Nancy Pelosi is not negotiating in good faith**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25dba21604&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Speaker Pelosi continues** to throw out all kinds of reasons for the failure on the negotiations, other than looking in the mirror," White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows told Fox News this morning.

**Even without Democrats’** help, President Trump is keeping his promise to put American workers and families first. In addition to the fastest economic recovery in history, America leads the world in Coronavirus testing and is on track to deliver a vaccine by the end of this year, thanks to the record-setting **[Operation Warp Speed](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7698116427&e=3ee4985eea).**

**This historic result** —and the important actions that led to it—don’t often make the headlines. The corporate news media has different priorities than most Americans do. But the real-world impact felt in living rooms across our country matters far more than the partisan gossip coming out of newsrooms in Washington, D.C., or New York.

**“The last time** the unemployment rate fell this much following its peak occurred between 1982 and 1999 following the global oil crisis, requiring almost 18 years, five presidential terms, and three administrations,” the Council of Economic Advisers writes.

**“The recovery** the United States is witnessing now is almost 41 times faster than that.”

**📖** [**MORE: September Jobs Report Shows American Grit!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=834aa1a426&e=3ee4985eea)

**📖** [**FULL REPORT: The ‘Buy American, Hire American’ President**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c087a72dc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48a26ba66a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4cad80a12&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7dfab43b38)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

| **Check out this picture and look closely. Can you spot the differences?**

On messaging targeted to strong Republicans, he leans into the dog-whistling “Law & Order” messaging that riles up the Trumpian base. For voters his team has deemed “persuadable” or “moderate,” here is Kinzinger using gentler language.

It’s insulting and silly, and the reason we have these mailers is because the voters see through Kinzinger’s sad attempts at manipulating them (don’t let the “requesting your ballot” language fool you -- that’s a ruse, too). These mailers came to us from the very people Kinzinger is trying to keep on his side.

**But those voters are on our side now. **Kinzinger is taking a page from the GOP playbook, but it’s a tired read.

If we can raise an additional $30,000, we can send a mailer of our own and target additional voters Kinzinger is attempting to fleece. [Can you pitch in to help us do that? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=94f89ad94f&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani

subject: ICYMI: How my opponent is funding dishonest attack ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
In case you missed my email earlier today... |
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| In case you missed my email earlier today, I wanted to share my frustration, and I’ll keep it short. Last night, I actually had the chance to get a look at the attack ad my opponent is spending a million dollars to run against me.

The ad is dishonest, but that’s to be expected a month before an election.

What’s really disappointing is how my opponent is funding this deceitful attack against me.

He isn’t buying the airtime with money from Iowans that want to see him elected – less than 20% of his contributions have come from in-state – instead, he’s using millions of dollars from wealthy donors in California and New York. People that don’t care about Iowa. People that just want to see another Democrat in Congress that will advance their agenda.

We need to push back on the lies and the outside influence and let Iowans decide this election, and I need your help. If you can, consider chipping in $5, $10, or $20 by clicking on the button below – and thank you for all you’ve done to help so far.

---

---
|
---
